infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SchnackAI needs microphone access to record your voice for conversations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SchnackAI may request access to your photo library only when an iOS system sharing or attachment flow requires it. SchnackAI does not scan your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SchnackAI may request permission to save user-initiated exported content to your photo library.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SchnackAI to use the microphone for native speech input.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow SchnackAI to transcribe your voice with the system speech recognizer.
